# uapi_usteer_config (Resource)

Usteer config.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uapi_usteer_config" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `assoc_steering` (Boolean) uci option assoc_steering.
- `band_steering_threshold` (Number) uci option band_steering_threshold.
- `debug_level` (Number) uci option debug_level.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the entry is active.
- `event_log_types` (List of String) uci option event_log_types.
- `ipv6` (Boolean) uci option ipv6.
- `load_balancing_threshold` (Number) uci option load_balancing_threshold.
- `local_sta_timeout` (Number) uci option local_sta_timeout.
- `local_sta_update` (Number) uci option local_sta_update.
- `max_assoc_sta` (Number) uci option max_assoc_sta.
- `max_neighbor_reports` (Number) uci option max_neighbor_reports.
- `max_retry_band` (Number) uci option max_retry_band.
- `measurement_report_timeout` (Number) uci option measurement_report_timeout.
- `min_connect_snr` (Number) uci option min_connect_snr.
- `min_snr` (Number) uci option min_snr.
- `min_snr_kick_delay` (Number) uci option min_snr_kick_delay.
- `network` (String) uci option network.
- `node_up_script` (String) uci option node_up_script.
- `remote_node_timeout` (Number) uci option remote_node_timeout.
- `remote_update_interval` (Number) uci option remote_update_interval.
- `roam_kick_delay` (Number) uci option roam_kick_delay.
- `roam_process_timeout` (Number) uci option roam_process_timeout.
- `roam_scan_interval` (Number) uci option roam_scan_interval.
- `roam_scan_snr` (Number) uci option roam_scan_snr.
- `roam_scan_tries` (Number) uci option roam_scan_tries.
- `roam_trigger_interval` (Number) uci option roam_trigger_interval.
- `roam_trigger_snr` (Number) uci option roam_trigger_snr.
- `seen_policy_timeout` (Number) uci option seen_policy_timeout.
- `signal_diff_threshold` (Number) uci option signal_diff_threshold.
- `ssid_list` (List of String) uci option ssid_list.
- `sta_block_timeout` (Number) uci option sta_block_timeout.
- `syslog` (Boolean) uci option syslog.

### Read-Only

- `etag` (String) Opaque ETag of the resource's current state, used for If-Match optimistic concurrency.
- `id` (String) Stable resource id assigned by uapi (a prefixed ULID).
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the underlying uci section is uapi-managed.
